response:
Sec. 1  
Allergies to peanuts are immune system responses to proteins found in peanuts  
These proteins trigger reactions in sensitive individuals  
Living underwater does not eliminate exposure to peanut proteins  
Allergic reactions are not influenced by environmental conditions such as water  
The body's immune system reacts to allergens regardless of location  

Sec. 2  
Underwater living does not provide a solution for peanut allergies  
Allergic individuals must avoid peanut exposure entirely  
Water does not neutralize allergens or prevent immune responses  
Medical treatments and avoidance strategies are necessary for managing allergies  
Living underwater is not a feasible solution for those with peanut allergies
